title: Create Evidence Case Lab React components from Stitch design
prompt:
Create 3 React 19 + TypeScript components for Evidence Case Lab in packages/ux-lab/src/components/evidence-case-lab/.

1. EvidenceCaseLab.tsx (default export)
   - Main shell: chat pane (left, 320px) + workspace (right)
   - Mode tabs in workspace header: Evaluate | Drift | Stress Test
   - Chat pane: input field, send button, message list
   - Import and render DriftView/StressTestView based on active tab
   - Evaluate mode: call POST http://localhost:3001/api/evidence-case/run {question}, render gate trace
   - Import { EMBRY } from '../../common/EmbryStyle'
   - Use Lucide icons: Shield, AlertTriangle, TrendingDown, Activity, FlaskConical, RefreshCw

2. DriftView.tsx (named export)
   - Fetch POST http://localhost:3001/api/evidence-case/drift {control_ids}
   - Two-column layout: Previous verdict (left) vs Current verdict (right)
   - Each column shows: verdict badge, gates_passed/total, gate_summary parsed into pass/fail dots
   - Diff highlighting: gates that changed get red or green border
   - Below: list of affected control_ids
   - Loading/error states

3. StressTestView.tsx (named export)
   - Fetch POST http://localhost:3001/api/evidence-case/stress-test {question_bank}
   - Header: accuracy bar, total/correct/wrong counts
   - Results table: question | expected | actual | correct? | gate_failed
   - Expandable rows for detail
   - Question bank dropdown selector

All components: NVIS dark theme (bg #141414, cards #1a1a1a), system monospace for IDs, EMBRY tokens.
Do NOT import from any charting library. Use inline SVG for any charts.
